text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara fails to show up for today's training.
Worried, I go to find her...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I went to the shopping district today! Do you
know why?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's because they threw me a "Thank you for
always cheering me up!" party!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! They gave me a bunch of snacks! Although I should be thanking them!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
When they told me there was gonna be a bunch
of snacks, I just plum forgot!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
choice_data_list: Make sure to be careful next time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'll be extra especially careful! I promise!
